'''Otoh Raban''' was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in [[3000 BBY]].

==History==
Otoh Raban was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]<ref name="SW:GB" /> in [[3000 BBY]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[War of the Gungan tribes]].<ref name="EA" /> During [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Gallo/Legends|Gallo's]] efforts to unite the Gungan villages and defeat Boss [[Rogoe/Legends|Rogoe]] in the War, Otoh Raban was led by Boss [[Hoxie]]. Hoxie was kidnapped by Rogoe and imprisoned in a base guarded by Rogoe's Millitiagungs. Gallo came through the city and after talking with a [[Unidentified Gungan villager (Otoh Raban)|villager]], agreed he would free Hoxie. Gallo and his partner [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Marsune (Gungan)|Marsune]] destroyed Rogoe's stronghold and freed Hoxie, who pledged his support to Gallo's cause.

==Behind the scenes==
Otoh Raban appears in the Gungan campaign in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
